hooks.command: fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$fp" ] && pnpm exec prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$fp" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$fp" == */package.json ]]; then text=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.tool_input.old_string // .tool_input.content) // empty'); if echo "$text" | grep -qE '"(commands|menus|submenus|keybindings|views)"'; then echo 'These contributes sections are auto-generated from contributions.json. Edit contributions.json instead, then run: pnpm run generate:contributions' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
